refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs targeting key productivity drivers (equipment operation efficiency and task execution efficiency) allows clearer design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that optimized equipment operation and task execution meet or exceed targets.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize throughput.
FR2: Optimize task execution efficiency to minimize idle and transition times.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize operational throughput.
DP2: Implement task scheduling and coordination algorithms to optimize task execution efficiency.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address both equipment operation and task execution efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling algorithms.
Data exchange requirements between vehicle and teleoperation modules.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 and DP2 are logically coupled but can be modularized with well-defined interfaces to minimize coupling.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate telemetry data for control and scheduling.
Risk of suboptimal coordination if interfaces between control and scheduling are not well defined.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface definitions and data flow between vehicle control and task scheduling DPs to reduce coupling.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Realizes DP1: advanced vehicle control algorithms for maximizing operational throughput.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle module exchanges telemetry data with NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task execution commands from NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module is the primary container for vehicle control DP with minimal diffusion.
NGHE Solution coordinates tasking and overall productivity but less focused on vehicle control.
Teleoperation module interacts with vehicle but does not contain vehicle control logic.
Safety Services unrelated to vehicle control DP.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module is the best architectural boundary to contain the vehicle control DP due to high containment score and low diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with NGHE Solution for tasking commands.
Risk of duplicated control logic if Teleoperation module implements overlapping functions.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and ownership boundaries to avoid diffusion and duplication.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Refined FRs are well matched with selected DPs addressing key productivity drivers with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Possible diffusion of control logic between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules if interfaces are not strictly enforced.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for vehicle control DP; task scheduling DP may require coordination at NGHE Solution level.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring productivity metrics and monitoring telemetry and tasking interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of vehicle control DP to Vehicle module; task scheduling DP allocation to NGHE Solution module to be confirmed in next level.

recommended_revisions: Clarify task scheduling DP allocation and interfaces in next decomposition level.
Strengthen interface definitions between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules to reduce diffusion risk.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are generally sound, task scheduling DP allocation and interface definitions require further refinement to reduce diffusion and clarify ownership.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize throughput.
FR2: Optimize task execution efficiency to minimize idle and transition times.

revise.why: To clarify task scheduling DP allocation and strengthen interface definitions to reduce diffusion risk.

assumptions: Telemetry data is accurate and timely.
Tasking commands can be reliably communicated to Vehicle module.
open_risks: Potential diffusion of control logic between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.
Unclear ownership of task scheduling DP.
evidence_needed: Interface specifications between Vehicle, NGHE Solution, and Teleoperation modules.
Telemetry and tasking data flow diagrams.
